title: Slow Roasted Australian Buckwheat Roast
description: A tangy and pillowy one-pot dish featuring buckwheat flour and roast, friendly to Buddhist temple dietary preferences. This recipe combines the unique flavor of buckwheat with traditional Australian roast ingredients.

ingredients.name: buckwheat flour
ingredients.notes: make sure it is gluten free

instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the buckwheat flour, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and potatoes to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the buckwheat mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a large Dutch oven or heavy pot with a lid.
Add the tomato paste and vegetable broth to the pot, stirring to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the mixture for 2 1/2 hours, or until the vegetables are tender and the buckwheat is cooked through.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
